scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:c && esbuild src/renderer/renderer.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/renderer/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife
scripts.build:c: node -e "const p = process.platform; const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('dist/main')) fs.mkdirSync('dist/main', {recursive:true}); if (p==='darwin') require('child_process').execSync('gcc -O3 -framework ApplicationServices -framework CoreGraphics src/main/mouse_ctrl.c -o dist/main/mouse_ctrl'); else if (p==='win32') require('child_process').execSync('gcc -O3 src/main/mouse_ctrl_win.c -o dist/main/mouse_ctrl.exe');"

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Aether-Command needs camera access to track your hand gestures.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Aether-Command needs to control other apps to perform actions.
